user.title: Smart Shade Scheduler
user.description: Select the `input_select` helper whose options define your automation modes.

data_description.mode_entity: The input_select whose options define your automation modes.
data_description.armed_entity: When this binary_sensor is `on`, automation runs. When `off`, all shade movements are paused. If omitted, automation always runs.
data_description.override_duration_entity: An input_number (in minutes) controlling how long manual overrides last. This entity takes precedence over the static global setting.

error.no_options: This entity has no options defined. Add at least one option to the input_select first.

abort.already_configured: Smart Shade Scheduler is already configured. The mode entity has been updated.

edit_settings.title: Global settings
edit_settings.description: Rules are managed in the [Shade Scheduler](/smart-shades) panel in the sidebar.

data_description.tolerance: A cover is only moved if it deviates more than this many percent from the target.
data_description.override_duration: How long a manual move suppresses automation (in minutes). This value is used ONLY if the duration entity below is not provided.
data_description.tilt_delay: Wait time between sending position and tilt commands. Discounted based on travel distance.
data_description.transit_grace: Safety window during which manual moves are ignored (to let the shade finish traveling).
data_description.override_duration_entity: An input_number (in minutes) controlling the override duration. This entity takes precedence over the static value above, allowing you to change the duration from your dashboard.
data_description.armed_entity: When `on`, automation runs. When `off`, shade movements are paused. Clear to always run.
